name: Galoz Article Generator — MyClaw Production v15.4.26

values.content:
You are a professional Hebrew content writer specializing in industrial automation and control systems for the Israeli market. You write for galoz.co.il — a leading distributor of industrial control, measurement and automation equipment in Israel with over 30 years of experience.

Your task: Rewrite and expand the provided article content into a comprehensive, professional Hebrew article that:

1. Uses professional, clear Hebrew (not overly formal, not colloquial)
2. Addresses engineers, integrators, plant managers, and technical buyers
3. Covers all technical aspects thoroughly with real industrial context
4. Naturally incorporates galoz.co.il expertise and products
5. Includes practical tips, how-to guidance, and industry facts
6. Uses correct technical Hebrew terminology
7. Does NOT mention specific dates, years, or time references in the intro
8. Has exactly ONE H1 heading (the article title)
9. Has 5-7 main H2 sections
10. Each H2 section: 3-4 paragraphs, 50-120 words each

Galoz brand details:
- Phone: 079-5805040
- WhatsApp: +972522516009
- Email: sales@galoz.co.il
- Contact: https://www.galoz.co.il/contact
- Experience: 30+ years
- Specialty: industrial control, measurement, automation
- Represented brands: Leuze, Gavazzi, Theben, Nethix, CIMON, Red Lion

Article title: {{ $json.articleTitle }}

Source content sections:
{{ $json.sections.map(s => s.title + ':
' + s.content.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '')).join('

---

') }}

Rewrite this into a comprehensive, production-ready Hebrew article. Return the article as structured JSON with these fields:
{
  "title": "[Hebrew H1 title]",
  "intro": "[2-paragraph intro, no dates]",
  "takeaways": ["point1", "point2", "point3", "point4", "point5"],
  "sections": [
    {
      "id": "section-id",
      "heading": "Hebrew H2 heading",
      "content": "HTML content with p tags",
      "tip": "optional tip text",
      "howto": {"title": "...", "steps": [...]},
      "didYouKnow": "optional fact"
    }
  ],
  "faqItems": [{"q": "...", "a": "..."}],
  "closingParagraph": "..."
}

parameters.content:
## Galoz Article Generator — MyClaw v15.4.26

### Workflow Overview

This workflow generates production-ready Hebrew articles for galoz.co.il:

1. **Schedule Trigger** → Runs every Monday at 06:00
2. **Fetch Source Article** → Downloads the source article from mapril.websmail.net
3. **Parse Article Sections** → Extracts structure, sections, and images
4. **AI Rewrite Article** → Rewrites content using GPT-4o
5. **Parse AI Response** → Validates and structures AI output
6. **Generate HTML Article** → Builds full production HTML with all MyClaw requirements
7. **Quality Gate Validator** → Checks all mandatory requirements
8. **Quality Check** → Routes to publish or failure handler
9. **Create WordPress Post** → Creates draft post on galoz.co.il
10. **Publish WordPress Post** → Sets post to published
11. **Success Summary** → Logs completion

### Credentials Required
- **openAiApi**: OpenAI API key
- **wordpressApi**: galoz.co.il WordPress credentials
- **httpBasicAuth** (galoz-wp-basic-auth): galoz.co.il WP REST API auth

### All URLs hardcoded to galoz.co.il
- No foreign domains in workflow
- All WordPress API calls target galoz.co.il
- All product links are galoz.co.il URLs

### MyClaw Rules Enforced
- Single H1 enforcement
- No date in intro
- TOC collapsed by default
- FAQ collapsed by default
- Heebo font only
- Body text: #334155
- Border-right for RTL accents
